name: i-80 Gold Corp.
description: i-80 Gold Corp. is a Nevada-focused gold developer targeting mid-tier producer status with a portfolio of high-grade development projects including Ruby Hill, Granite Creek, McCoy-Cove, and Lone Tree along Nevada's prolific gold trends. The company reported $95.2 million in revenue for 2025 and is advancing the Archimedes Underground Project at Ruby Hill toward mining commencement in Q3 2026.
